title: Pravachansara: The Essence of the Doctrine
description: Kundakunda's systematic presentation of Jain metaphysics — the nature of the soul, karma as material substance, and the path to omniscience.
introduction: Kundakunda's systematic presentation of Jain metaphysics — the nature of the soul, karma as material substance, and the path to omniscience.

translation.text: The soul in its pure state is omniscient, infinite, and blissful. Karma is material substance that adheres to the soul and obscures its true nature. Liberation is the removal of all karmic matter.
